reference: I had a baby in November. It was a pretty traumatic birth. I went from two centimeters to crowning in less than one hour. I ripped, and my doctor stitched me up, but now I hate the way my vagina looks! It looks like some of my insides are coming out where the scar tissue must be. Is there anything at home I can do to shrink this tissue?
text: I had a baby in November. It was a pretty traumatic birth. I went from two centimeters to crowning in less than one hour. I ripped, and my doctor stitched me up. But now I hate the way my vagina looks. It looks like some of my insides are coming out where the scar tissue must be. Is there anything at home I can do to shrink this tissue?
